## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` pass (frontend)
- [ ] If ML pipeline or artifacts changed: rebuilt and re-committed
      `backend/app/data/processed` and `backend/app/data/artifacts`
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, API keys)
